### Start a discussion about improving the Template:Geodesy page

[Talk pages](/wiki/Help:Introduction_to_talk_pages/1 "Help:Introduction to talk pages/1") are where people discuss how to make content on Wikipedia the best that it can be. You can use this page to start a discussion with others about how to improve the "[Template:Geodesy](/wiki/Template:Geodesy "Template:Geodesy")" page.
